Name: NPC_PARAM_ST
Description:
Defines the stats for a given enemy or group of enemies. Does not determine model or location.
Stats are often affected greatly by attached SpEffects.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Variation ID used when calculating the action ID.

Fields.Name: Resist Correction - Poison
Fields.Description: When the abnormal condition is activated, the maximum value is temporarily changed by using the set value of the abnormal condition resistance correction parameter.

Fields.Name: Name ID
Fields.Description: NPC Name Message Parameter ID

Fields.Name: Turn Velocity
Fields.Description: Rotational speed [degrees / second] that can turn in 1 second.

Fields.Name: Capsule Height
Fields.Description: The height of the capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Capsule Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: weight.

Fields.Name: Display Position - Height Offset
Fields.Description: Offset of the model display position in the Y (height) direction. It can be floated from the hit position.

Fields.Name: Base HP
Fields.Description: Death grace.

Fields.Name: Base FP
Fields.Description: Magic usage.

Fields.Name: Base Runes
Fields.Description: The amount of soul that a character can get at the time of death.

Fields.Name: Enemy Itemlot ID
Fields.Description: Specify the lottery ID_for enemies of the item to be acquired at the time of death. Please set only one of them.

Fields.Name: Map Itemlot ID
Fields.Description: Specify for the lottery ID_map of the item to be acquired at the time of death. Please set only one of them.

Fields.Name: FootIK Ankle Roll Angle Limit
Fields.Description: FootIK Ankle roll limit angle (-1 no limit)

Fields.Name: Chr Hit Judgment
Fields.Description: Set the hit judgment with other characters (If you hit the ragdoll, other characters will hit the ragdoll)

Fields.Name: Face Icon ID
Fields.Description: NPC face image ID (0 invalid value (default)). Specify the ID of the face image to be displayed in the Sign browsing menu, Kick menu, etc. If it is an invalid value, the dress-up model is displayed.

Fields.Name: Deactivation Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which the character is deactivated (valid only for open placement characters)

Fields.Name: Chr Activate Condition Param ID
Fields.Description: Character appearance condition parameter ID

Fields.Name: Foot IK Appearance Height Limit
Fields.Description: FootIK Appearance up / down limit

Fields.Name: Humanity Lot ID
Fields.Description: Specify the lottery ID of human nature to be acquired at the time of death

Fields.Description: Distance to warp instead of complementary movement in network synchronization. Faster people (ex dragons) need to be longer.

Fields.Name: Poise Recovery Correction
Fields.Description: Correction value for super armor recovery time

Fields.Name: Poise Knockback Distance
Fields.Description: Knockback distance that can be used only at the time of SA break

Fields.Name: Stamina
Fields.Description: Total amount of stamina.

Fields.Name: Stamina Recovery
Fields.Description: Stamina recovery basic speed [point / s]

Fields.Name: Defence - Physical
Fields.Description: Damage reduction base value for physical attacks.

Fields.Name: Defence - Slash
Fields.Description: Look at the attack attribute, and if it is a slash attribute, reduce the defense power.

Fields.Name: Defence - Strike
Fields.Description: Look at the attack attribute, and if it is a hit attribute, reduce the defense power.

Fields.Name: Defence - Thrust
Fields.Description: Look at the attack attribute, and if it is a piercing attribute, reduce the defense power.

Fields.Name: Defence - Magic
Fields.Description: Damage reduction base value for magic attacks.

Fields.Name: Defence - Fire
Fields.Description: Damage reduction base value against fire attack.

Fields.Name: Defence - Lightning
Fields.Description: Damage reduction base value against electric shock attack.

Fields.Name: Weapon Repel Power
Fields.Description: Used to determine the repelling of enemy attacks. // It is intended to be repelled by normal attacks other than guards. // Enemies with a hard skin can be repelled without doing anything ... It doesn't matter if it is a normal enemy.

Fields.Name: Resist - Poison
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting poisonous

Fields.Name: Resist - Scarlet Rot
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting sick

Fields.Name: Resist - Blood Loss
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting bleeding abnormalities

Fields.Name: Resist - Death Blight
Fields.Description: Difficulty in dealing with abnormal curse conditions

Fields.Name: Ghost Model ID
Fields.Description: Replacement model when wandering ghost, texture ID

Fields.Name: Override Resource Chr ID
Fields.Description: Replace resource ID during normal operation (do not use it unnecessarily)

Fields.Name: Guard Angle
Fields.Description: Defense range angle when guarding weapons. Pending

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption % - Slash
Fields.Description: Looking at the attack type, what percentage of the damage of the slashing attribute is cut? Specify

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption % - Strike
Fields.Description: Looking at the attack type, what percentage of the damage of the hit attribute is cut? Specify

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption % - Thrust
Fields.Description: Looking at the attack type, what percentage of the damage of the piercing attribute is cut? Specify

Fields.Description: Gaze at the Damipoli specified when locking the Lock-on Damipoly 22X (-1 Invalid)

Fields.Name: Override Texture Chr ID
Fields.Description: Normal replacement texture character ID (do not use it unnecessarily)

Fields.Name: Drop Type
Fields.Description: Display method when dropping an item (corpse emission or item display)

Fields.Name: Received Knockback %
Fields.Description: Decrease value when receiving knockback damage / Specifically, cut the initial knockback speed of the attacking side

Fields.Name: Knockback Param ID
Fields.Description: Set the parameter ID used for knockback

Fields.Name: Fall Damage Reduction %
Fields.Description: Fall damage reduction correction [%]

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption % - Stamina
Fields.Description: Defense against enemy stamina attacks when guarding successfully

Fields.Name: Resist - Sleep
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting sleep abnormalities

Fields.Name: Resist - Madness
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting mad

Fields.Name: Guard Resist - Sleep
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power against sleep (set as a special effect parameter)

Fields.Name: Guard Resist - Madness
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power against madness (set as a special effect parameter)

Fields.Name: Lock Gaze Point - Dummy Poly ID [7]
Fields.Description: Gaze at the Damipoli specified when locking the Lock-on Damipoly 22X (-1 Invalid)

Fields.Name: FP Recovery
Fields.Description: MP recovery basic speed [% / s]

Fields.Name: Weapon Repel Absorption
Fields.Description: Set a value to attenuate damage when repelling an attack

Fields.Name: Default LOD Param ID
Fields.Description: Default LOD Param ID (-1 None)

Fields.Name: Draw Type
Fields.Description: Drawing type

Fields.Name: NPC Type
Fields.Description: NPC type. OK if Zako enemies / boss enemies are distinguished

Fields.Name: Team Type
Fields.Description: NPC attack hit / not hit, aim / not aim setting

Fields.Name: Move Type
Fields.Description: Moving method. This changes the control.

Fields.Name: Lock Distance
Fields.Description: Lock-on distance [m]

Fields.Name: Weak Point - SE Material
Fields.Description: Determines the SE that sounds when the weak point is damaged. 1

Fields.Name: Weak Point - SFX Material
Fields.Description: Determines the SFX that occurs when the weak point is damaged. 1

Fields.Name: Parts Damage - Attack Type
Fields.Description:
Determines if weak parts (such as the head) will be affected by all attacks or just arrow attacks.
Headshot animation will be used for weak part attacks if it exists.

Fields.Name: Vow Type
Fields.Description: Pledge type

Fields.Name: Guard Level
Fields.Description: When guarding, which guard motion will the enemy attack? Decide

Fields.Name: Burn SFX Type
Fields.Description: SFX type at the time of combustion

Fields.Name: Guard Resist - Poison
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power to poison (set to the special effect parameter)

Fields.Name: Guard Resist - Scarlet Rot
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power (set as a special effect parameter) to make it a plague

Fields.Name: Guard Resist - Blood Loss
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power (set as a special effect parameter) to make bleeding

Fields.Name: Guard Resist - Death Blight
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power (set as a special effect parameter) to make a curse

Fields.Name: Parry Attack Power
Fields.Description: Parry attack power. Used by the parrying side

Fields.Name: Parry Defence Power
Fields.Description: Parry defense. Used by the parried side.

Fields.Name: SFX Size
Fields.Description: SFX size

Fields.Name: Push Out Camera Region Radius
Fields.Description: Camera extrusion area radius [m]

Fields.Name: Hit Stop Type
Fields.Description: Setting whether to perform hit stop processing

Fields.Name: Ladder End Check Offset Top
Fields.Description: Upper side of the ladder end judgment offset

Fields.Name: Ladder End Check Offset Bottom
Fields.Description: Lower side of ladder end judgment offset

Fields.Name: Use Ragdoll Camera Hit
Fields.Description: Does the camera hit the enemy ragdoll? (Valid only when hitting the player)

Fields.Name: Disable Cloth Rigid Hit
Fields.Description: If you want to prevent the cross rigid from hitting you

Fields.Name: Use Undulating Add Anim
Fields.Description: Whether to use front and back undulation addition

Fields.Name: Enemy Type - Type A
Fields.Description: Special attack A? Special attack A damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Is Ghost
Fields.Description: The opponent's attack will be able to slip through. The attack hits only when the anti-spirit weapon of the weapon para is attacked with the weapon of . Be careful not to confuse it with a wandering ghost

Fields.Name: Is No Damage Motion
Fields.Description: Do you not play the damage motion when the damage is 0?

Fields.Name: Is Undulating
Fields.Description: Do you match the back and forth rotation of the character with the undulations of the ground? Cannot be used for flying characters

Fields.Name: Is Wandering Ghost
Fields.Description: Will it be a wandering ghost when the player is a client?

Fields.Name: Is Enable Neck Turn
Fields.Description: Do you want to enable the swing set in Param Weaver?

Fields.Name: Disable Respawn upon Rest
Fields.Description: Do you ban respawn?

Fields.Name: Play Movement Anim until Over
Fields.Description: Do you want to play the moving animation until the animation is over? (Like a mayfly dragon.)

Fields.Name: Reduce Processing Load during Crowds
Fields.Description: Do you want to reduce the processing load during crowds? For babies (preferably phalanx)

Fields.Description: Special attack B? Special attack B damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Enemy Type - Type C

Fields.Description: Special attack D? Special attack D damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Always Use Special Turn
Fields.Description: Always execute a special turn (even if there is no navigation mesh at the turn destination, the special turn is continuously executed)

Fields.Name: Is Ride Attack Target
Fields.Description: Will you be the target of a riding special attack (if you are riding)?

Fields.Name: Enable Step Display Interpolation
Fields.Description: Whether to use step-over display interpolation

Fields.Name: Is Stealth Attack Target
Fields.Description: Is it a stealth attack target?

Fields.Name: Disable Init Dead
Fields.Description: If you do not make an initial death, TRUE, even if you kill and save it, the corpse will not be reproduced.

Fields.Name: Is Hit Rumble
Fields.Description: TRUE if it vibrates when hit. Use when you want to change from a normal hit stop, such as a dead person.

Fields.Name: Use Smooth Turning
Fields.Description: Whether to perform interpolation when turning between nodes in route movement

Fields.Name: Enemy Type - Type E
Fields.Description: Special attack E? Special attack E damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Enemy Type - Type F
Fields.Description: Special attack F? Special attack F damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Item Pickup Radius
Fields.Description: Radius to be added as a correction to the cylinder radius of normal Item search judgment (applicable to enemy drop items. Used for large characters etc.)

Fields.Name: Chr Capsule Height
Fields.Description: The height of the capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Chr Capsule Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Special Turn Type
Fields.Description: Special turning type

Fields.Name: Is Boss Soul Drop
Fields.Description: Do you get a boss in soul?

Fields.Name: Is Bullet Owner - By Object
Fields.Description: If you become the owner of a bullet, a flag that applies the object's damage calculation related to the bullet. Used for damage correction by power.

Fields.Name: Use FootIK Filter for Low Hit
Fields.Description: Whether to use the FootIk filter for low hits

Fields.Name: Use PvP Damage Modifiers
Fields.Description: Decide whether to calculate damage as a player when calculating damage. If it is invalid, it is treated as an enemy.

Fields.Name: Is Synced with Host World
Fields.Description: Can only be activated when active in the host world

Fields.Name: Skip Weak Damage Anim
Fields.Description: Weakness damage Whether to skip animation playback. Part damage rate and defense material are treated as weak points just by not playing the animation.

Fields.Name: Keep Capsule on Ride
Fields.Description: When riding on a character with this parameter , the character's Atari remains while riding.

Fields.Name: Is Special Collider
Fields.Description: Is it a special character?

Fields.Name: Defence - Holy
Fields.Description: Damage reduction base value for dark attacks.

Fields.Name: Threat Level
Fields.Description: Threat level. If it is 0, even if the PC is found, FE that seems to be found is not displayed.

Fields.Name: Special Turn Distance Threshold
Fields.Description: Make a special turn when the distance to the target is greater than or equal to the set threshold

Fields.Name: Automatic Foot Effect - SFX ID
Fields.Description: The SFX identifier used in the automatic foot effect. (ZZZ of XYYZZZ)

Fields.Name: Damaged - Material SE [1]
Fields.Description: Determine the SE that sounds when damaged. 1. It is OK to set it by appearance.

Fields.Name: Damaged - Material SFX [1]
Fields.Description: Determine the SFX that occurs when you take damage. 1. It is OK to set it by appearance.

Fields.Description: Determines the SE that sounds when the weak point is damaged. 2

Fields.Description: Determines the SFX that occurs when the weak point is damaged. 2

Fields.Description: Determine the SE that sounds when damaged. 2. It is OK to set it by appearance.

Fields.Name: Damaged - Material SFX [2]
Fields.Description: Determine the SFX that occurs when you take damage. 2. It is OK to set it by appearance.

Fields.Description: Non-attribute damage multiplier. The final damage value is the value obtained by multiplying the damage calculation result by this value.

Fields.Description: Slash damage multiplier. The final damage value is the value obtained by multiplying the damage calculation result by this value.

Fields.Description: Batter damage multiplier. The final damage value is the value obtained by multiplying the damage calculation result by this value.

Fields.Name: Absorption % - Thrust
Fields.Description: Puncture damage ratio. The final damage value is the value obtained by multiplying the damage calculation result by this value.

Fields.Name: Absorption % - Magic
Fields.Description: Magic damage multiplier. The final damage value is the value obtained by multiplying the damage calculation result by this value.

Fields.Name: Absorption % - Fire
Fields.Description: Flame damage multiplier. The final damage value is the value obtained by multiplying the damage calculation result by this value.

Fields.Name: Absorption % - Lightning
Fields.Description: Electric shock damage ratio. The final damage value is the value obtained by multiplying the damage calculation result by this value.

Fields.Name: Absorption % - Holy
Fields.Description: Dark damage multiplier. The final damage value is the value obtained by multiplying the damage calculation result by this value.

Fields.Name: Disable Lock-on Angle
Fields.Description: Create a conical lock-on non-lockable area beneath the enemy. The angle of the size of the cone. Can be changed temporarily from TAE

Fields.Name: Use Foot IK for Undulating Character
Fields.Description: Do you use the FootIK result to match your character to the undulations of the ground? Cannot be used for flying characters

Fields.Name: Role Name ID
Fields.Description: Specify the role name at the time of summoning. -1 Use the default role name of the target spirit body. 0 No display. 1 or more Used as a text ID.

Fields.Name: HP/FP Flask Recovery Chance
Fields.Description: HP / MP est recovery probability when defeating an enemy. The numerator is obtained from the NPC para with 10000 as the denominator.

Fields.Name: HP Flask Recovery Chance
Fields.Description: Recovery probability of MP Est when defeating an enemy. The numerator is obtained from the NPC para with 10000 as the denominator.

Fields.Name: FP Flask Recovery Chance
Fields.Description: Recovery probability of MP Est when defeating an enemy. The numerator is obtained from the NPC para with 10000 as the denominator.

Fields.Name: Missed HP/FP Flask Recovery - Bonus Chance
Fields.Description: Next time probability increase value when you miss the HP / MP est recovery lottery. Addition value of numerator.

Fields.Name: Missed HP Flask Recovery - Bonus Chance
Fields.Description: The next probability increase value when you miss the HP Est Recovery Lottery. Addition value of numerator.

Fields.Name: Missed FP Flask Recovery - Bonus Chance
Fields.Description: The next probability increase value when the MP est recovery lottery is missed. Addition value of numerator.

Fields.Name: Wandering Ghost Phantom ID
Fields.Description: Phantom shader with ID specified only on the guest side Specify the phantom shader ID and make it an illusion

Fields.Name: Listen Head Size
Fields.Description: The offset size to be set instead of the capsule offset at the time of hearing judgment. Use this value as an offset only if it is set to 0 or higher.

Fields.Name: Sound Bank ID
Fields.Description: Sound bank ID can be specified -1 Use the bank of character ID (resource name)

Fields.Name: Forward Undulation Limit
Fields.Description: The upper limit angle when adjusting the front-back angle to the undulation. If the total length is long, it is better to set it lower.

Fields.Name: Side Undulation Limit
Fields.Description: Upper limit angle when adjusting the left and right angles to the undulations. If the total length is long, it is better to set it lower.

Fields.Name: Platoon - Deactivation Movement Speed
Fields.Description: Platoon Deactive Movement Speed [m / s]

Fields.Name: Platoon - Deactivation Distance
Fields.Description: Distance to switch to platoon deactive movement [m]

Fields.Name: Sound Source Validity - Player Distance
Fields.Description: The distance from the player for which the character sound source is valid. -1 Effective at all distances

Fields.Name: Undulation Angle Correction
Fields.Description: Set the speed when adjusting the angle to the undulations

Fields.Name: Automatic Foot Effect - Decal Base ID [2]
Fields.Description: Decal to be attached when a foot effect occurs. Floor material is also taken into consideration

Fields.Name: Automatic Foot Effect - Decal Base ID [3]
Fields.Description: Decal to be attached when a foot effect occurs. Floor material is also taken into consideration

Fields.Name: Motion Re-target Reference Chr ID
Fields.Description: Character ID to be referred to when specifying the motion retarget destination

Fields.Name: SFX Resource Bank ID
Fields.Description: SFX resource bank ID can be specified -1 Use the bank of character ID (resource name)

Fields.Name: Activation Update Priority
Fields.Description: Used to determine the activation / renewal level. The larger it is, the lower the update level will be even if you are far from the player.

Fields.Name: Chr Navmesh Flag - Alive
Fields.Description: Flag the value of the touching Nav Mesh while the character is alive. Does not follow the movement.

Fields.Name: Chr Navmesh Flag - Dead
Fields.Description: Flag the value on the touching Nav Mesh while the character is dying. Does not follow the movement.

Fields.Name: Is Considered Undead
Fields.Description: Appears to determine whether an NPC is affected by anti-Undead effects.

Fields.Name: Wheel Rotation Type
Fields.Description: Wheel control type

Fields.Name: Wheel Rotation Radius
Fields.Description: Specify the radius of the wheel [m]

Fields.Name: Retarget Movement Rate
Fields.Description: Magnification of movement amount at the time of retargeting

Fields.Name: Ladder - Warp Z Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets along the Damipoly Z-axis at the specified value. Both positive and negative numbers can be specified.

Fields.Name: Load Asset ID
Fields.Description: Asset ID to be read in connection with character loading (for dynamic generation of characters, etc.).

Fields.Name: Overlap Camera - Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Set the Damipoly ID (220-227) to enable the overlap camera. If it is -1, it will be invalid.

Fields.Name: Material Ex Param ID [0]
Fields.Description: Resident Material Expansion Para ID0

Fields.Name: Material Ex Param ID [1]
Fields.Description: Resident Material Expansion Para ID1

Fields.Name: Material Ex Param ID [2]
Fields.Description: Resident Material Expansion Para ID2

Fields.Name: Material Ex Param ID [3]
Fields.Description: Resident Material Expansion Para ID3

Fields.Name: Material Ex Param ID [4]
Fields.Description: Resident Material Expansion Para ID4

Fields.Name: Sleep Collector - Enemy Item Lot
Fields.Description: Specify the lottery ID_for enemies of the item to be acquired when collecting Nemuri. Please set only one of them.

Fields.Name: Sleep Collector - Map Item Lot
Fields.Description: Specify for the lottery ID_map of the item to be acquired when collecting Nemuri. Please set only one of them.

Fields.Name: Foot IK - Error On Gain
Fields.Description: FootIK Appearance height correction ON gain value

Fields.Name: Foot IK - Error Off Gain
Fields.Description: FootIK Appearance height correction OFF gain value

Fields.Name: Sound Add Bank ID
Fields.Description: You can specify an additional sound bank ID -1 or 0 No addition (SEQ 16135)

Fields.Name: Material Variation Value
Fields.Description: It is a value used in combination with the defense material to classify abnormal conditions, damage SFX, and SE. SEQ16473

Fields.Name: Weak Point - Material Variation Value
Fields.Description: It is a value used for variation of abnormal condition, damage SFX, SE in combination with weak point defense material. SEQ16473

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: Super armor durability value

Fields.Name: Poise Recovery
Fields.Description: Correct the SA recovery speed by multiplying the SA basic recovery amount

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption % - Poise Damage
Fields.Description: Cut rate of SA damage when guard is successful

Fields.Name: Resist Correction - Blood Loss
Fields.Description: When the abnormal condition is activated, the maximum value is temporarily changed by using the setting value of the abnormal condition resistance correction parameter.

Fields.Name: Resist Correction - Death Blight
Fields.Description: When the abnormal condition is activated, the maximum value is temporarily changed by using the set value of the abnormal condition resistance correction parameter.

Fields.Name: Resist Correction - Frostbite
Fields.Description: When the abnormal condition is activated, the maximum value is temporarily changed by using the setting value of the abnormal condition resistance correction parameter.

Fields.Name: Resist Correction - Sleep
Fields.Description: When the abnormal condition is activated, the maximum value is temporarily changed by using the set value of the abnormal condition resistance correction parameter.

Fields.Name: Resist Correction - Madness
Fields.Description: When the abnormal condition is activated, the maximum value is temporarily changed by using the set value of the abnormal condition resistance correction parameter.

Fields.Name: Chr Dead Tutorial Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flag ID for the tutorial when the character is defeated for the first time. Flag ON when the character dies.

Fields.Name: Step Display Interpolation Time
Fields.Description: Step crossing display interpolation time

Fields.Name: Step Display Interpolation Trigger Value
Fields.Description: Step crossing display activation judgment value

Fields.Name: Lock Score Offset
Fields.Description: Lock score correction value

Fields.Name: DLC Completion SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Game Clear SpEffect applied after completing the DLC. Only applies once, does not ramp up per NG+ cycle.
